form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign by 0.8 len this track G3 Darley Stakes October 11 over 1800m defeating Gladius with 57.5kg at $3. Previous preparation first-up won by 2 len Deauville LR Pr Nureyev August 17 over 2000m defeating Nitoi with 57.5kg at $4.10. In form and looks a top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign by 0.8 len this track G3 Darley Stakes October 11 over 1800m defeating Gladius with 57.5kg at $3. Previous preparation first-up won by 2 len Deauville LR Pr Nureyev August 17 over 2000m defeating Nitoi with 57.5kg at $4.10. In form and looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after five months in a small field at Lingfield All Weather in the G3 Winter Derby Stakes on February 21 over 2000m, 1.5 len behind Sky Safari carrying 58kg at $6. Previously second-up 4th in a small field at Pontefract in LR on July 27 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Make Me King carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. Key chance.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Ayr in the LR Doonside Cup September 20 over 2000m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Almeric carrying 59.5kg at $10. Previously first up; fifth of 8 at York in the G3 Strensall Stakes August 23 over 1800m, 3.5 len behind King Of Cities with 60.5kg at $7. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation ran last of 8 at Sakhir in BHRG2 on November 14 over 2000m, 12 len behind Royal Champion with 58kg at $19. First up last campaign 3rd of 7 at Southwell All Weather in the G3 Winter Derby Stakes on February 22 2025 over 2220m, 6 len behind Royal Champion carrying 58kg at $9.50. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Nottingham in the LR Ben Marshall Stakes October 29 over 1700m, soft track; 5 len behind Ice Max carrying 59kg at $6.50. First up last campaign fifth of 8 at York in the G3 Criterion Stakes June 28 over 1400m, 4 len behind Quinault carrying 63kg at $17. Likely to find this out of reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). First-up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Nottingham in the LR Ben Marshall Stakes October 29 over 1700m, soft track; 5 len behind Ice Max carrying 59kg at $6.50. First up last campaign fifth of 8 at York in the G3 Criterion Stakes June 28 over 1400m, 4 len behind Quinault carrying 63kg at $17. Likely to find this out of reach.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 4th of 9 at Al Rayyan in QAG2 on February 14 over 1600m, 2 len behind Make Me King with 58kg. Last start 5th of 10 at Saint-Cloud in the G3 Prix Edmond Blanc on March 29 over 1600m, slow going 2 len behind Dreamliner with 57kg at $5.70. Thereabouts last time out. Sure to be thereabouts.
